full_description: Put the block into the plate.
schema: {A} denotes the block, {B} denotes the plate, {a} denotes the arm that moves the block
preference: num of words should not exceed 12
seen: Pick up {A} and place it into {B}.
Find {A}, lift it, and set it into {B}.
Move {A} with {a} and drop it into {B}.
Grasp {A}, move it upward, and place it into {B}.
unseen: Carry {A} over and place it into {B}.
